goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'camboats'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'entrance fee', and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'broxbourne' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'leave after 09:00'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called camboats
Make sure you get address, entrance fee, and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from broxbourne and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on monday and should leave after 09:00
Make sure you get arrival time and travel time
